title: SARIF AI emit profile — reporting descriptor object
description: Input contract for a SARIF reportingDescriptor an AI producer supplies to the add-reporting-descriptor verb, stored under run.tool.driver.notifications[] (default) or run.tool.driver.rules[] (--rules). Requires a non-empty string id (SARIF §3.49.3); a missing, null, non-string, or empty id is rejected.

id.description: Non-empty descriptor id (SARIF §3.49.3). Empty is rejected; whitespace-only is accepted, matching the verb's IsNullOrEmpty gate.
